_meta.description: Track D audio fixtures generated from synthetic TTS, never downloaded interview audio. Clean plus four deterministic degraded variants are covered for mic and system channels.
_meta.protected_asset_rule: Una vez aprobados, estos fixtures no deben modificarse para hacer pasar tests; si falla, se corrige el pipeline.

scenarios.ground_truth_transcript: When the recorder stops keep the final keyword checksum.
